title: n8n Docker: Full docker-compose stack
body:
version: '3.8'
services:
  n8n:
    image: n8nio/n8n:latest
    container_name: n8n
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "5678:5678"
    environment:
      - N8N_HOST={{your-domain.com}}
      - N8N_PROTOCOL=https
      - WEBHOOK_URL=https://{{your-domain.com}}
      - N8N_ENCRYPTION_KEY={{your-encryption-key}}
      - DB_TYPE=postgresdb
      - DB_POSTGRESDB_HOST=postgres
      - DB_POSTGRESDB_DATABASE=n8n
      - DB_POSTGRESDB_USER=n8n
      - DB_POSTGRESDB_PASSWORD={{db-password}}
    volumes:
      - n8n_data:/home/node/.n8n
    depends_on:
      - postgres
  
  postgres:
    image: postgres:16
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      - POSTGRES_DB=n8n
      - POSTGRES_USER=n8n
      - POSTGRES_PASSWORD={{db-password}}
    volumes:
      - postgres_data:/var/lib/postgresql/data

volumes:
  n8n_data:
  postgres_data:
description: Production-ready docker-compose for n8n with PostgreSQL - complete setup (docs.n8n.io/hosting/installation/server-setups/docker-compose/)
